problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue may resolve Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
